title: Digital: Portal Pages

predicates.membersLoaded: (()=>{const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0);const pi=document.querySelector('.pg-info');return location.pathname.endsWith('/portal-members.html')&&[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-metric')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0).length>=4&&[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-chart-card')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0).length>=3&&rows.length===4&&[...document.querySelectorAll('table thead th')].some(e=>/^Portal Status$/i.test((e.textContent||'').trim()))&&!!pi&&/1.4 of 4/.test(pi.textContent||'')&&!/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch/i.test(document.body.textContent||'')})()
predicates.messagesLoaded: (()=>{const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0);const pi=document.querySelector('.pg-info');return location.pathname.endsWith('/portal-messages.html')&&[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-metric')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0).length>=4&&rows.length===4&&[...document.querySelectorAll('table thead th')].some(e=>/^Priority$/i.test((e.textContent||'').trim()))&&!!pi&&/1.4 of 4/.test(pi.textContent||'')&&!/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch/i.test(document.body.textContent||'')})()
predicates.billingLoaded: (()=>{const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0);const pi=document.querySelector('.pg-info');return location.pathname.endsWith('/portal-billing.html')&&[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-metric')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0).length>=4&&rows.length===4&&[...document.querySelectorAll('table thead th')].some(e=>/^Action$/i.test((e.textContent||'').trim()))&&!!pi&&/1.4 of 4/.test(pi.textContent||'')&&!/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch/i.test(document.body.textContent||'')})()
predicates.notificationsLoaded: (()=>{const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0);const pi=document.querySelector('.pg-info');return location.pathname.endsWith('/portal-notifications.html')&&[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-metric')].filter(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0).length>=4&&rows.length===4&&[...document.querySelectorAll('table thead th')].some(e=>/^Trigger$/i.test((e.textContent||'').trim()))&&!!pi&&/1.4 of 4/.test(pi.textContent||'')&&!/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch/i.test(document.body.textContent||'')})()

preflight.note: off-camera: stage the shared persisted module-rail preference to expanded so the Digital module label reads on camera (step 1). .wc-rail-expand-toggle toggles the '.wc-rail.rail-expanded' class; skipped when already expanded (the observed default). Probe-verified July 11: expanded shows the Digital rail label at x31 with the Digital item active.

off-camera: stage the shared persisted sidebar-panel preference to expanded so the CUSTOMER PORTAL group's five entries read with labels (aside.sidebar width 220). .wc-rail-panel-toggle is the same control both ways; skipped when already expanded (the observed default).

ops.note: start page identity: the lesson opens on Portal Members (the one list read in full). startUrl portal-members.html loads directly; the four sibling pages are reached by genuine sidebar clicks later.
pre-roll: preflight staged the CUSTOMER PORTAL sidebar panel expanded (width 220, labels visible); abort the take if collapsed
pre-roll: preflight staged the module rail expanded so 'Digital' reads
loaded: 4 KPI tiles, 3 insight cards, 4 member rows, Portal Status column, '1–4 of 4', no agent-service error state
the five CUSTOMER PORTAL entries (Booking Page, Members, Messages, Billing, Notifications) are visible with labels

safety proof: the tour only ever sits on portal-members/messages/billing/notifications. It never enters portal-book.html (a chrome-less customer page — pointed at, never opened; RESIDUAL R1), never a *-edit create form, never login.html. Full-page navs change location atomically between allowed pages; mid-nav samples throw and are skipped.
the CUSTOMER PORTAL sidebar stays expanded the whole tour (it never collapses and we never leave the admin chrome)
mutation guardrail (Members dwell): 4 rows and '1–4 of 4' hold — no member created, edited, or deleted; + New Record and Export pointed at, never pressed
mutation guardrail (Messages dwell): 4 rows, '1–4 of 4' — no message opened, composed, replied, or sent; list read only
mutation guardrail (Billing dwell): 4 rows, '1–4 of 4' — a live-money activity log, read only
mutation guardrail (Notifications dwell): 4 rows, '1–4 of 4' — no notification sent, created, or edited; list read only

step 8 (p33): 'Click Booking Page' — SAFETY/ENGINE OVERRIDE (RESIDUAL R1): Booking Page (Customer) opens a chrome-less full-page customer site (no admin sidebar, only inert Help/Sign-in anchors) from which the engine — which navigates only via on-screen clicks and cannot go back or trim mid-take — cannot return to reach steps 9–11. So the Booking Page entry is POINTED AT (callout ⑧), the customer site is described from the narration, and the page is never opened. Verified July 11: portal-book.html has no return-to-admin control; CDP Alt+Left does not drive browser-back.
